text: Okay, so I wanted to tell you something.
But I have a few questions for you first.
Mm-hmm.
Do you know why I named the company ARIA after you?
I don't know.
I wanted to make sure we've made something that represented who you are, like your kind,
your thoughtful, and you always like to take care of others.
Do you know what we do at ARIA?
What do you think?
I don't know.
You know how you see a nurse when you're feeling sick sometimes?
Mm-hmm.
Well, the people who help these nurses behind the scenes do a lot of busy work, like calling,
scheduling, filling out forms, and checking documents.
So we build these really smart computer helpers that take care of all the busy work for them.
Hi, this is ARIA.
My name's ARIA too.
I help nurses take care of people.
My dad says nurses aren't busy.
They really are.
That's why I help with the little things, like schedules and reminders.
So they have more time to care and take care of sick people.
You think we need a lot of money to make something that helps people like that?
Mm-hmm.
Why?
Because you always buy materials to help them.
Yeah.
But in our world, materials are, you know, the best people.
There's a lot of work we do with our minds.
Can I show you something?
You just gave us a bunch of money to do the things that we're doing.
What does that say?
18.2 million dollars.
That's a lot of money.
That's a lot of money, isn't it?
Yeah.
Can we use it to get a dog?
Well, the money's not for us.
Did you put a poster on your new work office saying we're hiring?
Kind of like that.
Yeah, we have a careers page.
Do you want to see the new office?
Should we take a day off school?
Mm-hmm.
What, to have you fun?
Mm-hmm.
Okay.
I just can't be on Monday or Wednesday.
Why?
Because I have orchestra.
Okay.
Well, you can't be on Friday either.
Oh, is that right?
I have fun Friday.
Fun Friday.
Extra reason.
You definitely don't want to get in the way of that.
